message:
fix(test): resolve render_deterministic_across_both_surfaces non-determinism

The test was failing because AnalyticsEntered triggers a view transition
animation that uses Instant::now() internally. Consecutive renders get
different timestamps, producing different animation progress values and
different pixel shifts in the transition overlay. Clear the transition
before the determinism check so renders are purely layout-dependent.

Also syncs .beads issue tracker state.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
